Invalid display
   Display 99 is not a valid header because it is indented prose
   I2C bus:             /dev/i2c-4
   DRM connector:       card1-DP-1
   Monitor:             MSI:FAKE VALID LOOKING MONITOR:FAKE-SERIAL

Invalid display
   I2C bus:             /dev/i2c-8
   Monitor:             DEL:ANOTHER FAKE MONITOR:FAKE-SERIAL-2
